title: ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: BROOKINGS MENTAL HEALTH CARE AND SUBSTANCE USE TREATMENT ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders. Services include medical detox, residential care, day treatment, outpatient treatment, after care, and medication-assisted treatment. Provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 615 5th Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (877) 408-8941 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 408-8941 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan, and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
